description: As a Pharmacy Quality Assurance specialist, audit outpatient prescription refill records in the VistA database using the YDBGui web interface. Navigate to the Prescription global ^PSRX (File #52) and locate a prescription record that contains refill history. The refill history is stored in the sub-node '1' (Refill subfile), following the structure ^PSRX(IEN,1,n,0). Display the refill details, such as Date and Quantity, ensuring the data values are visible in the interface.
